Closes #<!-- issue number — every substantive PR traces to an issue -->

## What & why

<!-- 2–5 sentences: the problem and the shape of the solution, written for a
     reviewer who hasn't read the linked issue. -->

<!-- Freeform from here: add only the sections this change earns — detailed
     changes, design notes, migration notes. If you made any change outside
     the linked issue's scope (drive-by fix), give it its own clearly-labelled
     section, however small. -->

## Screenshots

<!-- Required whenever the change touches UI: before/after screenshots (or a
     short recording) of the affected surface. Delete this section entirely
     for changes with no visible UI effect. -->

## Review focus

<!-- Mandatory. Where is the risk or uncertainty concentrated? Point the
     reviewer at the part that most deserves scrutiny and say why.
     "Nothing risky — mechanical change" is a valid answer; silence is not. -->
